race.comment: ARIZONA SKY (4) bolted in at Pinjarra when a $1.85 favourite 14 days ago, mowing down his rivals and careering away for an emphatic win. Pike remains in the saddle today and suspect similar tactics will be adopted from the wide alley. Can repeat the dose. FREE TO FLY (10) missed by 0.7L last start after a good maiden win two back at Ascot. She was on the quick turnaround last time out and now is 21 days between runs. CJP sticks with her and she rates highly on her recent form. SPACE ACADEMY (3) notched up his third win when scoring by 1.4L at York last start as the race favourite. Getting out to 1650m today won't be an issue and Tsang's claim comes in handy. Maps to get every chance and another forward showing is on the cards. PRINCE EPAULETTE (1) got back to winning ways last start and can go back-to-back without surprising. BLUE LUPIN (2) wasn't far away last start and can sit closer this time. Big chance.
